walnut-and-chocolate-tart-lezzet.name: Walnut And Chocolate Tart
instructions: 1. Mix and knead necessary materials in a deep container for dough.
2. Take a dough that doesn’t stick and split into two.
3. Open 1 finger thickness on the dough kitchen counter.
4. Oil and pulp mold.
5. Drawn walnuts, sugar and egg whites and release on tart pulp.
6. Cut the remaining dough and strips.
7. Place the strips in the form of cage on weighing by smearing.
8. Drop chocolate into cavities and rub eggs yellow on dough.
9. Cook the powder on the oven with 185 degrees preheated in advance.
10. Serve servis from mold.
11. 11. For an alternative flavor, look at the chocolate tart recipe.

walnut-pie-with-chocolate-argiro.name: Walnut Pie With Chocolate
instructions: Beat the eggs with sugar for 7–8 minutes until tripled in volume and becomes fluffy, cramy mass.
In a bowl, sift flour, cocoa, baking powder, salt, vanilla, cinnamon, clove and nutmeg. Add the semolina, and mix all the solid ingredients with a spoon.
Gradually pour the solid materials into the egg mixture and fold them gently with a spatula, with moves from the bottom up, so that the volume does not lose.
Add the walnuts and sunflower oil and continue the gentle stirring.
Add the chocolate to the mixture and mix lightly until incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a buttered baking pan – ether round 32 cm diameter, or 25×35 cm long.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, at 170°3 in the air, in the medium rack, for about 40 minutes, without opening the evening door.
Allow the sweet to cool completely before squeezing or serving.

warm-baked-apples-with-cranberry-caramel.name: Warm Baked Apples With Cranberry-caramel Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Using small end of melon baller, scoop out stem end and core of each apple, leaving bottom intact. Using vegetable peeler, remove peel from top third of each. Stand apples in 11x7-inch glass baking dish, trimming apple bottoms if necessary to create flat surface.

Bring 3/4 cup cream, cranberry juice concentrate, sugar, and butter to boil in heavy medium saucepan, stirring until sugar dissolves. Pour syrup over apples, adding some to hollow centers. Bake apples until tender, basting once, about 1 hour.
Meanwhile, beat remaining 1/2 cup cream in medium bowl until peaks form. Chill whipped cream in bowl.

Transfer each apple to shallow bowl, emptying any juices from center into baking dish. Pour syrup from dish into medium saucepan. Boil syrup until thick enough to coat spoon, 2 to 3 minutes. Spoon over warm apples. Top each baked apple with whipped cream.

warm-brussels-sprouts-salad-with-quinoa-.name: Warm Brussels Sprouts Salad With Quinoa, Walnuts And Blueberries
warm-brussels-sprouts-salad-with-quinoa-.original_name: Ensalada templada de coles de Bruselas con quinoa, nueces y arándanos

ingredients.item: A handful of nuts or pecan

instructions: Limpiamos las coles quitando las hojas externas que puedan estar arruinadas y los tallos si tuvieran, y las lavamos.
We purify the oven to 220 been 3 been, heat up and down. We cut them up half or quarter, depending on their size.

We prepared an oven plate. Rociate Brussels steels with some olive oil and season with salt and pepper. We mix with our hands to well mix our suit and distribute our steels onto our plate. We put the plate in the oven at medium height and cook about 20 minutes, till they are slightly golden. We withdraw from the oven and let them tempt.
Cooking the quinoa as instructed by the package.

To mix quinoa, Brussels steels baked, cranberries, lettuce and nuts into a big salad. Mix the balsamic vinegar and remaining olive oil into a small bowl. Fold the vinegar mixture onto the salad and mix till well combined. Serve the hot salad.

watermelon-avocado-salsa.name: Watermelon Avocado Salsa
instructions: Combine watermelon, avocado, onion, lemon juice, habanero, parsley, and salt in a bowl. Chill in the refrigerator before serving, about 15 minutes.

watermelon-mint-agua-fresca.name: Watermelon-mint Agua Fresca

ingredients.prep: seeded, coarsely chopped watermelon (from about a 2 1/2-pound watermelon)

instructions: Combine mint leaves, sugar, and 1/4 cup water in a small pot. Bring to a boil and stir until sugar has dissolved. Transfer mixture to a heatproof container and chill, uncovered, until cool, about 30 minutes.

Strain mint syrup into a blender; discard mint leaves. Add watermelon and lime juice and blend until very smooth. Using a fine-mesh sieve, strain into a pitcher; discard solids. Add 2 cups water and stir well to combine. Serve with mint sprigs.
Aqua fresca can be stored in an airtight container and chilled for up to 1 day.

who-hash.name: Who-hash

ingredients.item: Fully cooked luncheon meat (such as spam®)

instructions: Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Spread potatoes and meat in a single layer in the skillet; cook until browned on the bottom, about 5 minutes. Turn potatoes and meat; cook until the other side is browned, about 5 minutes. Add onion; cook and stir until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.

whole-corn-on-the-grill.name: Whole Corn On The Grill

ingredients.item: Charred spring onion and sesame-chile butter

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium heat.
Grill corn, rotating occasionally, until husks are blackened (some will flake and fall off) and kernels are tender with some browned and charred spots, 25–35 minutes.
Let corn cool slightly, then shuck.
Serve with Charred Spring Onion and Sesame-Chile Butter.

You can prepare a modern presentation by serving couscous or kinoa instead of rice or bulgur.

wrapped-kadayf-with-walnuts-lezzet.name: Wrapped Kadayif With Walnuts
instructions: 1. Add and mix cinnamon into cined walnut.
2. Divided into 8 equal parts by separating the dough into the grips.
3. Share each piece for cinnamon walnut to the size of the tea plate and the middle.
4. Place the woods into the wrapped and lubricated oven mold by roll.
5.   Take 1-2 spoons of oil on each piece of dough, melting the medicine.
6. Pre-heated 170 degrees in the oven to cook until pink.
7. Boil the water with powder sugar in a pot.
8. Add 25 gr butter after a few minutes after boiling.
9. Add and mix lemon juice and get from the stove.
10.  Take away from the oven and walk away from the hot bowl.
